note_zh: GW 为公开披露的合同或合作容量，不代表已全部投运。站点/云租约与芯片/系统框架可能指向同一底层基础设施，禁止跨层相加。金额混合算力采购、租约和基础设施投资，也不宜直接求和。
note_en: GW figures are disclosed contracted or partnership capacity, not necessarily operating capacity. Cloud/site leases and chip/system frameworks may refer to the same underlying infrastructure and must not be added across layers. Dollar figures also mix compute purchases, leases and infrastructure investment.

deals.scope_zh: 最多 100 万枚 TPU；2026 年上线
deals.scope_en: Up to 1M TPUs; expected online in 2026
deals.note_zh: 后续 5GW Google/Broadcom 协议明确建立在该扩容之上，为避免重叠不计入汇总图。
deals.note_en: The later 5GW Google/Broadcom agreement builds on this expansion; excluded from the chart to avoid overlap.

deals.scope_zh: 在纽约、得州建设定制数据中心
deals.scope_en: Custom data centers in New York and Texas
deals.note_zh: 披露投资额但未给出明确 GW，因此只列入交易表。
deals.note_en: Investment value disclosed, but no specific GW figure; table only.

deals.scope_en: Azure; NVIDIA Grace Blackwell / Vera Rubin
deals.note_zh: Anthropic 承诺采购 300 亿美元 Azure 算力，并签约最多 1GW。
deals.note_en: Anthropic committed to $30B of Azure compute and contracted up to 1GW.

deals.scope_zh: 下一代 TPU；2027 年起上线
deals.note_zh: Anthropic 后续公告将该协议明确表述为 5GW。
deals.note_en: Anthropic's subsequent announcement explicitly described the agreement as 5GW.

deals.note_zh: 合同上限 5GW；近期实际交付节奏低于合同总量。
deals.note_en: Contracted capacity is up to 5GW; near-term deployment is below the headline total.

deals.scope_zh: 超过 22 万枚 NVIDIA GPU；计划一个月内获得
deals.scope_en: More than 220,000 NVIDIA GPUs; expected within one month
deals.note_zh: 协议覆盖 Colossus 1 全部算力，披露口径为超过 300MW。
deals.note_en: Agreement covers all Colossus 1 compute; disclosed as more than 300MW.

deals.scope_zh: 美国新增数据中心容量；超过 200 万枚芯片
deals.scope_en: Additional US data-center capacity; more than 2M chips
deals.note_zh: 4.5GW 为新增容量；Stargate 的 10GW / $500B 总目标不另行叠加。
deals.note_en: 4.5GW is incremental capacity; the 10GW / $500B Stargate umbrella target is not added separately.

deals.scope_zh: 训练与推理算力；三次协议累计
deals.scope_en: Training and inference compute; cumulative across three agreements
deals.note_zh: 由 $11.9B、$4B 和 $6.5B 三次协议构成；未披露可比 GW。
deals.note_en: Comprises $11.9B, $4B and $6.5B agreements; no comparable GW disclosed.

deals.scope_zh: NVIDIA 系统；首个 1GW 计划 2026 年下半年
deals.note_zh: 仅为 LOI，且可能与 2026 年确认的 5GW 安排重叠，不计入汇总图。
deals.note_en: LOI only and may overlap the 5GW arrangement confirmed in 2026; excluded from the chart.

deals.scope_zh: 多代 AMD Instinct；首个 1GW 于 2026 年下半年
deals.note_zh: 确定性协议，部署规模与 AMD 股权认股权证里程碑挂钩。
deals.note_en: Definitive agreement; deployment scale is tied to AMD warrant milestones.

deals.scope_zh: OpenAI 自研加速器与网络系统；2026H2–2029
deals.note_zh: 部署部分为 term sheet，未按已签容量计入汇总图。
deals.note_en: Deployment is governed by a term sheet and is excluded from signed-capacity totals.

deals.scope_zh: 数十万枚 NVIDIA GB200 / GB300；2026 年底前部署
deals.scope_en: Hundreds of thousands of NVIDIA GB200 / GB300; deployed by end-2026
deals.note_zh: 未披露可比 GW；2026 年的 $100B / 2GW 是在该协议基础上的扩展。
deals.note_en: No comparable GW disclosed; the 2026 $100B / 2GW deal expands this agreement.

deals.scope_zh: 得州 Milam County 数据中心租约
deals.note_zh: OpenAI 签署 1.2GW 租约；另与 SoftBank 各投资 $0.5B 于 SB Energy。
deals.note_en: OpenAI signed a 1.2GW lease; OpenAI and SoftBank also invested $0.5B each in SB Energy.

deals.scope_zh: 低延迟推理算力；分批上线至 2028 年
deals.note_zh: 容量为 750MW，面向推理而非通用训练集群。
deals.note_en: Capacity is 750MW and intended for inference rather than general training clusters.

deals.scope_en: Trainium3 / 4; expansion of the prior $38B agreement
deals.note_zh: 2GW 仅对应新增 $100B 扩展，不与旧协议金额重复相加为单一新订单。
deals.note_en: The 2GW corresponds to the incremental $100B expansion; it is not a standalone replacement for the prior agreement.

deals.scope_zh: 3GW 推理 + 2GW Vera Rubin 训练
deals.note_zh: OpenAI 表述为已获得下一代推理算力；旧 10GW LOI 不再计入汇总。
deals.note_en: OpenAI described this as secured next-generation compute; the older 10GW LOI is excluded from totals.

deals.scope_zh: OpenAI正在乔治亚州Effingham县开发名为Project Camellia的数据中心项目，并已与佐治亚电力公司签订合同，计划在2028年至2032年间分阶段交付3.2吉瓦的电力。
deals.scope_en: OpenAI is developing Project Camellia, a data center in Effingham County, Georgia, and has contracted with Georgia Power Company for 3.2 GW of power to be delivered in phases between 2028 and 2032.
deals.note_zh: 该数据包含已宣布的电力供应合同，而非已运营的电力设施。
deals.note_en: This includes an announced power supply agreement rather than operational power facilities.

deals.scope_zh: OpenAI 与合作伙伴在密歇根州萨利纳开工建设 1GW 数据中心园区 The Barn，作为 Stargate 计划一部分用于 AI 基础设施。
deals.scope_en: OpenAI and partners broke ground on The Barn, a 1GW data center campus in Saline, Michigan, as part of the Stargate program for AI infrastructure.
deals.note_zh: GW 数据源自 OpenAI 官方公告，未经独立核实；项目涉及多方合作，具体产权与运营细节未披露。
deals.note_en: GW figure comes from OpenAI's own announcement and is not independently verified; project involves multiple partners with undisclosed ownership and operational details.
